phase3_session_1_fingerprint_note: Verified clean: fingerprint --verify --check-broker passed before session, frozen hashes matched, working tree clean, 0 open orders, 0 open positions at start and shutdown.

phase3_fingerprint._note: Frozen at Phase 3 readiness commit. SHA check uses CAPTURE_AFTER_PUSH sentinel: a committed file cannot contain the SHA of the commit that holds it (self-referential hash). Integrity is enforced by the four file hashes below plus clean working tree. Record the frozen commit SHA via: git tag phase3-baseline && git push origin phase3-baseline. Regenerate hashes with: python scripts/capture_session_fingerprint.py. A session whose runtime fingerprint diverges from this baseline is NOT eligible for the Phase 3 clean cohort without a declared protocol amendment.

_broker_hash_amendment.reason: 11 defect fixes applied between Session 1 and Session 2 (commit 37f8f1a). alpaca_broker.py changed for Fix 10: option quote timestamp now parsed from exchange latestQuote.t instead of datetime.utcnow(). No threshold, parameter, or strategy logic changes. Other behavioral fixes (RVOL pace projection, EOD entry cutoff, signal age gate, scanner direction match, exit bid pricing, ORB unified definition, delta hard rejection, IV filter dead code, ledger breakeven/profit-factor/delta-bucket, replay fixed strike, VWAP lookahead, backtest EOD exit) are all defect corrections. Session 1 was valid under the then-current baseline. Sessions 2+ run under this updated baseline. Cross-session comparison should note the code boundary at S1/S2.

Config edited as uncommitted working-tree change, runner restarted 11:38 ET (log: session_2026-07-15_exploration.log). Counters correctly restored from DB (entries=3, pnl=+106). No additional trades: EOD 30-min entry cutoff closed the window at ~11:59 ET. Clean shutdown 12:34 ET, 0 trades, 0 positions. Config reverted to max_trades_per_day=3 after shutdown; never committed.

phase3_sessions.contamination_note: All 3 entries filled via stale-cancel/reconciler recovery (pattern now 8-for-8 across S2-S4). Orders placed 10:00 ET off the first post-open re-scan, stale-cancelled 10:05, reconciler-restored 10:15. AAPL position lost ~48% of premium during the 10-minute blind window before local management began — trailing stop fired at first managed cycle, far below the intended 25%-from-peak level. Broker-reported fill prices authoritative throughout. One reconciliation timing artifact (RIVN, same as S2/S3 pattern). Clean shutdown: 0 positions, 0 orders, api_errors=0. Session ended early by user instruction at 10:36 ET after all 3 entries exhausted and closed. Fingerprint verified pre-session at commit 7912692.

Both fills were caught at the 5-minute cancel window by the new terminal-state recheck and managed from the same poll cycle — no blind window. One additional order genuinely stale-cancelled (confirmed CANCELED at broker before removal). Health report shows orders filled=2 for the first time (prior sessions showed filled=0 with everything mislabeled cancelled).

Breakdown failed to follow through; normal bounded stop-out, managed throughout.

minimum_observations.note: 6 trades recorded. strategy (3/3), universe_group (2/4), fill_path (5/1) now at or past 3-obs minimum for at least one bucket.

Q1_orb_vs_vwap.note: ORB: 6 trades, -$39 net (1W/5L, win +$83 PLTR; includes -$91 AAPL blind-window loss). VWAP: 5 trades, +$129 net (3W/2L, wins +$123/+$25 and small losses). Emerging separation favoring vwap_reclaim, but ORB's number carries the S4 defect-amplified loss — re-evaluate ORB on post-Fix-12 trades only.

Q7_fill_path.note: reconciler_recovery: 8 trades +$86 (S2-S4, defect era); fill_tracker_recheck: 2 trades +$5 (S5, post-Fix-12); direct: 1 trade -$1. Fix 12 validated in S5 — reconciler_recovery expected to stay at 0 going forward; recheck path is the new normal for cancel-window fills.

open_issues.description: ALL 8 mid-session limit entries across S2-S4 filled at/around the 5-minute stale-cancel window (S2: PLTR, XLE; S3: RIVN, TSLA, IWM; S4: AAPL, IWM, RIVN — 8-for-8, fully systematic). Root cause: broker cancels are asynchronous — a 2xx response means the cancel REQUEST was accepted, not that the order is cancelled — but FillTracker trusted the success response and dropped the order, leaving the filled position unmanaged until the next reconciler pass (10-15 min blind window). Escalating impact: S3 IWM peak-tracking started late; S4 AAPL lost ~48% of a $188 premium during the blind window (-$91, largest Phase 3 loss).
open_issues.resolution: Fix 12 (2026-07-16): FillTracker now confirms the order's actual terminal state via get_order_status after EVERY cancel attempt (success and 422/error paths). FILLED/PARTIALLY_FILLED routes to the fill handler immediately — position opens same cycle, no blind window. Non-terminal status defers to the next poll instead of assuming dead. Chosen over extending entry_order_timeout_secs because it is a pure state-sync defect fix (no threshold/parameter change, no frozen-hash file touched) and eliminates the blind window at any timeout value, whereas a longer timeout only shifts the race. Regression tests added (test_successful_cancel_but_filled_routes_to_fill_handler, test_cancel_in_flight_defers_to_next_poll); existing stale-cancel mocks updated to realistic async-cancel semantics.

open_issues.status: FIXED (2026-07-15 post-S3, verified live in S4)
open_issues.description: Observability only, no trading impact. (1) on_fill events not emitted for reconciler-recovered entries — the diff detection only wrapped fill_tracker.poll. (2) on_exit reported last cached price/limit instead of broker-confirmed fill. (3) session_end trades count wrong after restart. All three fixed post-S3 (commit 7912692) and verified working in S4: all 3 recovered fills pushed, exits pushed broker-confirmed prices, session-end showed trades=3 W/L=1/3.

_fix12_amendment.reason: Defect fix only: FillTracker confirms broker terminal state after every cancel attempt instead of trusting the async cancel-request response. No threshold, parameter, or strategy logic change. entry_order_timeout_secs unchanged at 5 min. None of the four frozen-hash files (config, requirements, ticker_universe, broker adapters) modified. Sessions 5+ run with Fix 12; cross-session comparison of fill_path dimension should note reconciler_recovery is expected to drop to ~0 from S5 onward.
